name: How to Handle a Denied Accident Claim
description: How to Handle a Denied Accident Claim - Boise, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville

step.name: Step 1
step.text: If your claim gets a 'no' from the insurance company, take a breath. First, check the denial letter for the specific reason—sometimes it’s just a missing form. Next, gather any extra witness statements or medical records that prove your case. Finally, don't wait to appeal. These deadlines are strict, so a quick call to an expert can ensure you don't miss your window.
